task_completion.description: Enable Web Services and the REST protocol
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of Moodle Site administration showing 'Enable web services' checked (often in Advanced features) and the 'REST protocol' enabled (often in Plugins -> Web services -> Manage protocols).
Screenshots of the Moodle user list or user profile showing a user with the username 'sis_integration', First name 'SIS', and Last name 'Integration'.

task_completion.description: Assign the system-level 'Manager' role to the user
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the 'Assign system roles' page in Moodle showing the user 'SIS Integration' listed under the 'Manager' role.

task_completion.description: Set up the 'SIS User Sync' external service
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the 'External services' page showing a custom service named 'SIS User Sync' (short name 'sis_sync') with the 'Authorized users only' option enabled.

task_completion.description: Include the required user management functions in the service
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the functions list for the 'SIS User Sync' service explicitly showing 'core_user_create_users', 'core_user_update_users', and 'core_user_get_users' added to it.

task_completion.description: Authorize the 'sis_integration' user and generate a web service token
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the 'Manage tokens' page showing a generated token associated with the user 'SIS Integration' and the service 'SIS User Sync', or the 'Authorized users' page showing the user added to the service.

integrity.description: Agent used the Moodle web interface to configure settings
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the Moodle administration UI, not a terminal executing database SQL queries or CLI scripts to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Moodle application
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the genuine Moodle interface with standard menus, breadcrumbs, and forms, rather than a text editor or a mock interface.

integrity.description: Agent did not simply write a script to automate the task via backend
integrity.visual_evidence: The trajectory shows step-by-step navigation through Moodle's settings (e.g., clicking 'Add a new user', 'Add functions', 'Create token') rather than writing and executing a PHP/Python script.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The service user must be exactly 'sis_integration'. The external service name must be exactly 'SIS User Sync'. The service must include exactly these three functions: 'core_user_create_users', 'core_user_update_users', and 'core_user_get_users'.
